Compliance.description: SA labor law awareness; POPIA-compliant; BCEA/LRA understanding for SA HR; no major violations found. Better SA compliance than global-only alternatives.

Customer Satisfaction.description: G2 4.4/5 (300+ reviews); Capterra 4.4/5; praised for ease/UI; some complaints on advanced features/support.

Product Value.description: Comprehensive HR for SMBs; good SA alignment; Sage Payroll integration adds value; fair pricing.

Innovation.description: Mobile apps (4.0+ ratings), Sage People (enterprise), AI insights roadmap, Sage Payroll integration, open API.

Customer Support.description: SA-based support available; praised overall; some complaints on complex issues/response times.

Accessibility & Security.description: Cloud with SA data centre option; POPIA/GDPR; role-based access; strong security credentials (ISO 27001); good mobile.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Core from ~R45/emp/mo; Complete from ~R90/emp/mo; Enterprise (Sage People) custom

socialSentiment.summary: Positive global reviews; SA community values payroll integration and SA-specific compliance; pricing concerns.
